title: Polymerase chain reaction (PCR)
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"ei3pq","text":"This protocol is used to amplify target DNA fragment for plasmid construction or other use.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"7332h","text":"Set up a small box with ice, put DNA and 2×high Fidelity Master Mix (MCLAB)/or 2×Rapid Master Mix (Vazyme) into it before going into the thermocycler. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
warning: {"blocks":[{"key":"esoe2","text":"Please wear gloves for the experiment,  don't try to touch the lid after PCR program initiation. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Choose one case from the cases below.
Add the following reagent to a PCR tube.(50 μl). %s %s
Use the palm centrifuge to mix the solution in PCR tube.
Put the PCR tube into the thermocycler and Run the program.
Using agarose gel electrophoresis to confirm if correct construct was present.
Pick colonies as the template for colony PCR. Mix the colonies with 2.5μl ddH2O and pick 1μl as PCR template and 1.5μl for culture.
Add the following reagent to a PCR tube.(10 μl). There is no need to add Gold View as colouring agent for agarose gel eletrophoresis when using 2×Rapid Master Mix (Vazyme) as PCR enzyme. %s %s
Use the palm centrifuge to mix the solution in PCR tube.
Put the PCR tube into the thermocycler and Run the program.
Using agarose gel electrophoresis to confirm if correct construct was present.
creator: Shuning Guo
